data_collection.audio_data: Cough audio recordings provided by users

data_storage.policy: Audio data may be processed temporarily and not permanently stored unless explicitly authorized.
data_storage.security: Secure processing pipelines and encryption should be used for stored data.

user_rights: Right to consent to data usage
data_sharing: User data is not shared with third parties without explicit consent.
anonymization: Personal identifiers should be removed before analysis when possible.
